mapper.sql: AA.POPUP_SEQ , AA.POPUP_MST_CD , AA.POPUP_NAME , AA.FROM_DATE , AA.TO_DATE , AA.POPUP_DESC , AA.CLOSE_OPT , AA.POPUP_URL , AA.POPUP_WIDTH , AA.POPUP_HEIGHT , AA.CLICKS , AA.SORT_ORD , AA.USE_YN , AA.DEL_YN , AA.RGTR , TO_CHAR(AA.RGT_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RGT_DTTM , AA.CHNR , TO_CHAR(AA.CHNG_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CHNG_DTTM
mapper.select:
/* mapper.popup.com.erns.coching.PopupDAO.getList */
SELECT
, FI.FILE_ID , FI.REF_CODE , FI.REF_SEQ , FI.FILE_SIZE
FROM T_POPUP_INF AA JOIN T_FILE_INF FI ON FI.REF_CODE = 'FT_POPUP' AND AA.POPUP_SEQ = FI.REF_SEQ
AND AA.POPUP_MST_CD = #{popupMstCd , jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND AA.DEL_YN = 'N' AND AA.USE_YN = 'Y' AND FI.DEL_YN = 'N'
AND CURRENT_DATE BETWEEN COALESCE(AA.FROM_DATE, '2000-01-01')::DATE AND COALESCE(AA.TO_DATE, '3000-12-31')::DATE
ORDER BY AA.SORT_ORD ASC, AA.RGT_DTTM DESC
